statement: PTBCC models annotators through a shared set of prototype confusion matrices and per-annotator distributions over those prototypes.
domain: The PTBCC generative model and reconstructed equations (7)-(14).
pass_conditions: learned prototypes have shape [S,K,K] and finite row-normalized probabilities
annotator weights have shape [W,S] and finite row-normalized probabilities
40 deterministic exact-model trials retain the accepted recovery evidence
failure_exit: The cumulative unit suite exits nonzero on any violated invariant.
